ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the contact */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the contact */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier of the company the contact belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the contact within their company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the contact belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the contact */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the contact is located */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the contact is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the contact is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the contact's location */,
  "phone1" TEXT /* Primary phone number of the contact */,
  "phone2" TEXT /* Secondary phone number of the contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "web" TEXT /* Website of the contact or their company */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier of the location */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the contact (e.g., active, inactive, prospect) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source from which the contact was acquired (e.g., referral, event, ad) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the contact was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the contact's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the company is located */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the company is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the company is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the company's location */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the company */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the company */,
  "web" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier of the location */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Annual revenue of the company */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the company (e.g., active, inactive, acquired) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the company was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the company's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City name */,
  "county" TEXT /* County name */,
  "state" TEXT /* State name */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country name */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the location's information */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier of the user role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account's information */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
